docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 77480557) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORTEZ, POLLY AS TO DEFENDANT HYATT HOTELS CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-01-2026 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-09-2026

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-14-2026 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-03-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
